hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); import re; m=re.search(r'/(frontend|backend|supabase)/', f); ext=re.search(r'\.(jsx|js|py|sql)$', f); print(f'DOCS SYNC REQUIRED: update {m.group(1)}/CLAUDE.md before finishing.') if m and ext else None" 2>/dev/null || true
